prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: apparel and accessories. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept for apparel and accessories. Examples of valid sub-spaces: workwear for a specific trade, technical outdoor apparel for a niche, heritage menswear, slow-fashion womenswear, modular accessories (bags, belts, leather), eyewear, footwear for a specific use case, hand-knit or hand-loomed pieces. Stay inside apparel and accessories; do not drift into pure home goods or pure outdoors gear.
